examples: A girl who wants to be a stewardess must be pretty and helpful.
One day before the plane took off, the stewardess approached Sam and asked him to fasten his seat belt.
Facing her smile, I always believe that if she is of the right height, she is likely to become a stewardess.
The latest report concerns the death of a young air stewardess who was prescribed the drug.
She's an air stewardess on United Airlines, the same airline her son Mark was on when he died.
